Other languages:

Coin pouch
Type: Container

A small pouch filled with coins. It's a bit heavy, but you're not complaining.

Coin pouch is an openable treasury item. It can be found by completing various activities. They can have the odds of finding them increased with the Chest Finding equipment attribute.

Loot Tables

These are the sub-tables for the various materials, coins, and items that can come from these chests.

These treasury items make 4 independent loot rolls when they are opened.

Main Loot Table

100.000% Per Roll (100.000% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Coins 1-10 40.000% 87.040% ~1 in 1 1 (1-10)
Coins 10-30 30.000% 75.990% ~1 in 1 1 (10-30)
Coins 30-50 15.000% 47.799% ~1 in 2 1 (30-50)
Coins 50-70 10.000% 34.390% ~1 in 3 1 (50-70)
Coins 70-100 4.800% 17.861% ~1 in 6 1 (70-100)
Coins 100-1000 0.200% 0.798% ~1 in 125 1 (100-1000)

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Antique market assessor Trinketry lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 150,000 steps 79,000 steps
Brig repair Carpentry lvl. 20
Smithing lvl. 10		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 22,000 steps 13,000 steps
Guard duty Agility lvl. 55 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 27,500 steps 13,250 steps
Horseshoe making Smithing lvl. 20 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 17,500 steps 8,750 steps
Tinkering Crafting lvl. 25 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 23,000 steps 11,000 steps
Underwater basket weaving Crafting lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 75,000 steps 41,750 steps
Wreck diving Foraging lvl. 35
Agility lvl. 35		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 250,000 steps 139,000 steps

‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Item Attribute Drop

Item Name Item Type Relevant Attribute
Royal troubadour hat +1% Chance to find 1 Coin pouch While doing Trinketry.
While in the GDTE area.

Chests 		Agility chest, Carpentry chest, Cooking chest,

Other
